metadata.description: claude code plugins by ani potts: session awareness, usage mining, and tools.

plugins.name: cc
plugins.description: session mesh for claude code (email-cc semantics): awareness digests, file-overlap alerts, topic subscriptions, cross-session messaging

plugins.name: mine
plugins.description: mines every claude code session into sqlite. costs, search, patterns, error memory.

plugins.name: fuel
plugins.description: gives claude code a fuel gauge for its 5-hour, 7-day, and 200k-context meters. pre-turn hook injects threshold-aware context. /fuel state | handoff | quiet | loud.
